title: Savory Stew (Vegetarian)
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with a variety of vegetables and served with crusty bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth and red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Stir in tomato paste, thyme, and rosemary.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
Stir in frozen peas and cook until thawed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
